mapper.insert: INSERT INTO essay_evaluation (user_id, document_id, mode, task_prompt, essay_text, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, content_quality, task_achievement, structure_score, vocabulary_score, grammar_score, expression_score, grammar_error_count, spelling_error_count, vocabulary_error_count, result_json) VALUES (#{userId}, #{documentId}, #{mode}, #{taskPrompt}, #{essayText}, #{gaokaoScore}, #{maxScore}, #{band}, #{overallScore}, #{contentQuality}, #{taskAchievement}, #{structureScore}, #{vocabularyScore}, #{grammarScore}, #{expressionScore}, #{grammarErrorCount}, #{spellingErrorCount}, #{vocabularyErrorCount}, #{resultJson})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, document_id, mode, task_prompt, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, content_quality, task_achievement, structure_score, vocabulary_score, grammar_score, expression_score, grammar_error_count, spelling_error_count, vocabulary_error_count, created_at, LEFT(essay_text, 100) AS essay_text FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT id, user_id, document_id, mode, task_prompt, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, content_quality, task_achievement, structure_score, vocabulary_score, grammar_score, expression_score, grammar_error_count, spelling_error_count, vocabulary_error_count, created_at, LEFT(essay_text, 100) AS essay_text FROM essay_evaluation WHERE document_id = #{documentId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE document_id = #{documentId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, document_id, mode, task_prompt, gaokao_score, max_score, band, overall_score, content_quality, task_achievement, structure_score, vocabulary_score, grammar_score, expression_score, grammar_error_count, spelling_error_count, vocabulary_error_count, result_json, created_at, essay_text FROM essay_evaluation WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT AVG(overall_score) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT MAX(overall_score) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(created_at)) FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT ROUND(AVG(content_quality), 1) AS avgContentQuality, ROUND(AVG(task_achievement), 1) AS avgTaskAchievement, ROUND(AVG(structure_score), 1) AS avgStructureScore, ROUND(AVG(vocabulary_score), 1) AS avgVocabularyScore, ROUND(AVG(grammar_score), 1) AS avgGrammarScore, ROUND(AVG(expression_score), 1) AS avgExpressionScore, COALESCE(SUM(grammar_error_count), 0) AS totalGrammarErrors, COALESCE(SUM(spelling_error_count), 0) AS totalSpellingErrors, COALESCE(SUM(vocabulary_error_count), 0) AS totalVocabularyErrors FROM essay_evaluation WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND overall_score IS NOT NULL
